recalls.Description: The Viofairy Hair Growth Serum has been recalled due to serious safety concerns related to child poisoning. Packaged in a black bottle with gold and white labeling, the serum prominently features the name 'VIOFAIRY HAIR GROWTH SERUM' and '5% MINOXIDIL With BIOTIN' on its front. This product does not meet the mandatory child-resistant packaging standards set by the Poison Prevention Packaging Act, creating a significant risk for young children if ingested.
recalls.Title: Viofairy Hair Growth Serum Recalled Due to Child Poisoning Risk and Non-Compliance with Safety Standards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers should reach out to FDAF via email at sesuall@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled VIOFAIRY Hair Growth Serum bottle and packaging
Recalled VIOFAIRY Hair Growth Serum bottle and packaging (Back)

Manufacturers.Name: Guangzhou Runshu BioTech Co., Ltd. of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from January 2024 to September 2025 for approximately $15.

Distributors.Name: Shen Zhen Shi Yi Jiu Si Mao Yi You Xian Gong Si dba FDAF, of China

Hazards.Name: Non-compliant packaging that increases the risk of serious injury or death from poisoning in children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to keep the recalled serum out of children's reach and contact FDAF for guidance on disposing of the product and obtaining a free replacement. They will need to discard the serum contents and send a photo of the empty bottle in the trash to sesuall@outlook.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Viofairy Hair Growth Serum recalled due to child poisoning risk. Learn how to dispose of it safely and get a free replacement.

recalls.Description: The Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit is being recalled due to a significant risk of serious injury or death from child poisoning. The serum is packaged in a black glass bottle featuring a black and golden dropper cap and a black and white label, with "SEFUDUN HAIR GROWTH SERUM" and "BIOTIN 5% MINOXIDIL" prominently displayed. The kit also includes a black plastic applicator. Unfortunately, the packaging does not comply with the mandatory child-resistant standards set by the Poison Prevention Packaging Act.
recalls.Title: Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kits Recalled Due to Child Poisoning Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to Nengmiaokeji at sesuall@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit for Men
Recalled Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit for Men Packaging (Box Side)

Recalled Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit for Men Packaging (Bottle Back)

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from December 2023 to August 2025 for approximately $15.

Hazards.Name: Non-compliant packaging poses a risk of poisoning to children

Remedies.Name: Secure the serum out of children's reach and contact Nengmiaokeji for a free replacement

recalls.metaDescription: Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kits recalled due to child poisoning risk. Contact for a free replacement.

recalls.Description:
The recall affects MyOnlyStyler Root Booster Hair Dryers, which are white with black bristles and feature "MY ONLY STYLER" on the handle. These hair dryers, measuring 12 inches in length and 1.75 inches in width, have the model number "MOS-22" located on the back of the handle. The absence of an immersion protection device poses a significant risk of serious injury or death from electrocution if the device comes into contact with water while plugged in.

Consumers are urged to immediately discontinue use and unplug the recalled hair dryers. To obtain a full refund, customers must contact McLee Creations and submit a photo of the hair dryer with its power cord cut in half through the recall registration portal. Detailed disposal instructions are available on the company's website.
recalls.Title: McLee Creations Issues Recall for MyOnlyStyler Root Booster Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution and Shock Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, visit www.myonlystyler.com and select "Product Recalls" or go directly to https://www.myonlystyler.com/product-recalls.

Images.Caption: Recalled MyOnlyStyler Root Booster Hair Dryer with the power cord cut in half for disposal

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from November 2022 to October 2025, priced between $50 and $60.

Importers.Name: McLee Creations LLC, of Valencia, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution and shock due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Full refund upon return of the product

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert for MyOnlyStyler Root Booster Hair Dryers due to electrocution risk. Immediate action required for a full refund.

recalls.Description: The recall pertains to the Bio Ionic One-Inch-Long Barrel Curling Iron, model number LXT-CL-1.0, with date codes ranging from 0722 to 1223. This curling iron features a black handle and barrel, measuring approximately 15.8 inches in length, 2.87 inches in height, and 1.65 inches in width, with a weight of around 15 ounces. The handle displays a blue BIOIONIC logo and includes a black label with operating instructions. You can find the model number on the rating label on the handle, while the date code is engraved on the plug prongs in MMYY format, indicating the month and year.
recalls.Title: J & D Brush Issues Recall for Bio Ionic Curling Irons Due to Burn Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Bio Ionic at 877-853-9627 from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email longbarrelsupport@bbicompany.com, or visit www.bioionic.com and navigate to "Product Recalls" at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Bio Ionic One-Inch-Long Barrel Curling Iron
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 357,000 (In addition, about 3,000 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Hair Curling Iron
Date code etched on prong of recalled hair curling iron plug
Rating label on recalled hair curling iron

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 258 reports of the curling iron barrel detaching, including six minor burn injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available through Amazon, Bioionic.com, and both in-store and online at Salon Centric, Ulta, Sephora, and Nordstrom, as well as various salons and beauty supply stores across the country from August 2022 to July 2024, priced around $165.

Importers.Name: J & D Brush Co., LLC of Commack, New York

Hazards.Name: Risk of burn due to the potential for the curling iron barrel to snap and detach.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to stop using the recalled curling iron immediately, unplug it, and contact Bio Ionic to arrange for a free replacement. They will need to cut off the plug and return it to the company using a prepaid shipping label.

recalls.metaDescription: J & D Brush recalls Bio Ionic curling irons due to burn hazards. Learn how to get a free replacement and stay safe.

recalls.Description: Empower Brands has announced a recall for its Remington hair dryers, specifically the model D3190DCDN. These hair dryers are purple with black accents and feature three black operating buttons on the handle. The Remington logo is displayed in white on the side, and the product dimensions are approximately 8.5 inches long, 11.6 inches high, and 3.6 inches wide, weighing around 1.5 pounds.
recalls.Title: Empower Brands Issues Recall for Remington Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution and Shock Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately unplug the recalled hair dryers and stop using them. For assistance, contact Empower Brands at 1-844-695-2134 from 9 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email HairdryerRecall@Spectrumbrands.com. More details can be found at https://www.remingtonproducts.com/product-recalls or by visiting www.remingtonproducts.com and selecting "Product Recalls" at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Remington Hair Dryer

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart Marketplace, Target Marketplace, and Amazon from March 2024 to June 2025, priced between $25 and $32.

Importers.Name: Spectrum Brands Inc. for the benefit of Empower Brands, LLC, both of Middleton, Wisconsin

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution or shock due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Stop using the hair dryer, cut the power cord, and submit a photo for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert: Empower Brands recalls Remington hair dryers due to electrocution risks. Stop using and contact for a refund.

recalls.Description: Séfralls Hair Generation Serum is being recalled because its packaging does not meet child-resistant standards mandated by the Poison Prevention Packaging Act. The serum, which is contained in an amber dropper bottle with a white and gold dropper and a distinctive label, poses a significant risk of serious injury or death if ingested by young children. The product is labeled with the names "Séfralls" and "Minoxidil" prominently displayed on the front.
recalls.Title: Séfralls Minoxidil Hair Generation Serum Recall Due to Child Poisoning Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to Guangzhou Ariel Biotech via email at sefralls@outlook.com for further assistance.

Images.Caption: Recalled Séfralls Minoxidil Hair Generation Serum
Recalled Séfralls Minoxidil Hair Generation Serum

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from June 2024 to June 2025 for approximately $1.

Importers.Name: Guangzhou Ariel Biotech Co. Ltd, dba Ariel Biotech of China

Hazards.Name: Non-child-resistant packaging increases the risk of poisoning in children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must store the recalled serum out of children's reach and contact Guangzhou Ariel Biotech for guidance on disposing of the product and obtaining a replacement.

recalls.metaDescription: Séfralls Hair Generation Serum recalled due to non-compliant packaging posing a child poisoning risk. Contact for safe disposal and replacement.

recalls.Description: Legend Brands is recalling its Bliss hair dryers due to serious risks of electrocution and shock. These foldable travel hair dryers, available in teal and pink with silver accents, feature three speed settings and a temperature regulation switch. The Bliss logo is displayed in white on the side of the device. Consumers should be aware that these hair dryers do not include an immersion protection device, which poses a significant safety risk if they come into contact with water while plugged in.
recalls.Title: Legend Brands Recalls Bliss Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution and Shock Hazards; Available Exclusively at Burlington Stores
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Legend Brands at 888-325-9044 from 9 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or via email at support@shoptrakk.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Bliss hair dryer - pink

Retailers.Name: Available at Burlington stores nationwide from January 2025 to March 2025 for approximately $20.

Importers.Name: Legend Brands LLC, of New York

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution or shock due to lack of immersion protection, violating federal safety regulations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the hair dryers, unplug them, and contact Legend Brands for a full refund. They will need to destroy the hair dryers by cutting the cord and disposing of the unit, then send a photo of the destroyed product to support@shoptrakk.com. Legend Brands will reach out to all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: Legend Brands recalls Bliss hair dryers due to electrocution risks. Immediate action required for refunds and safety compliance.

recalls.Description: AliExpress has issued a recall for LVOE-branded hair dryers due to serious electrocution and shock hazards. These hair dryers, available in purple, pink, light gray, and gold, feature multiple air settings, temperature control, and come with three or four nozzles. The product is labeled with 'Product name,' 'Hair Dryer,' and 'Product model: X13' on its packaging. The lack of an immersion protection device poses a significant risk if the dryers fall into water while plugged in, violating federal regulations.
recalls.Title: AliExpress Recalls LVOE Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution and Shock Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to AliExpress online service at https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/home?language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp, or email us_product_recall@aliexpress.com. Additional information can be found at the AliExpress Buyer Help Center or by visiting www.aliexpress.com and clicking on 'Recalls' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled LVOE hair dryers
Recalled LVOE Hair Dryer Plugs

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Meili Technology Co., of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution and shock due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Stop using the hair dryer, unplug it, and contact AliExpress for a full refund. Consumers must destroy the hair dryer by cutting the cord and disposing of it, then send a photo of the destroyed unit to us_product_recall@aliexpress.com or respond to the recall email from AliExpress.

recalls.metaDescription: AliExpress recalls LVOE hair dryers due to electrocution hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safely dispose of the product.

recalls.Description: AliExpress is recalling its compact mini hair dryers due to serious electrocution and shock hazards. These foldable dryers, available in blue, green, pink, and white, feature a white switch with two settings and a thermostatic function. The side of the dryer displays the label "Fashion Hair Dryer" alongside images of two animal faces and a white button marked "OK."
recalls.Title: AliExpress Recalls Mini Travel Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to AliExpress customer service at https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/home?language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp, email us_product_recall@aliexpress.com, or visit the AliExpress Buyer's Help Center at www.aliexpress.com and click on "Recalls" at the bottom of the page.

recalls.Description: AliExpress has issued a recall for foldable travel hair dryers available in blue, pink, and purple. These dryers feature a red switch with three adjustable settings and an air-collecting nozzle, with the model name 'Guangmei 3858 hair dryer' marked on the device. The lack of an immersion protection device poses serious electrocution and shock hazards if the dryer comes into contact with water while plugged in.
recalls.Title: AliExpress Recalls Foldable Travel Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to AliExpress online service at https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/home?language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp, email us_product_recall@aliexpress.com, or visit the AliExpress Help Center and click on 'Recalls' at the bottom of the page for further details.

recalls.Description: AliExpress has issued a recall for two models of hair dryers: the 6-in-1 Multi Styler and the 5-in-1 Multi Styler. These hair dryers, available in light gray and light green, feature multiple heating modes and are powered by a V9 digital motor. The 6-in-1 model measures approximately 16 x 7 x 5 inches and weighs four pounds, while the 5-in-1 model measures about 14 x 6 x 4 inches, also weighing four pounds. Both models bear the model number HS01 on their undersides.
recalls.Title: AliExpress Recalls 6-in-1 and 5-in-1 Multi Styler Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to AliExpress via their online service at https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/home?language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp, email at us_product_recall@aliexpress.com, or visit https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/knowledge?categoryId=1000110454&language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp&questionId=1061297473&regulation=US-product-recall. More details can also be found by clicking on 'Recalls' at the bottom of www.aliexpress.com.

recalls.Description: SHEIN is recalling its Teckwe multifunctional hair dryer brushes due to a serious electrocution hazard. These brushes, available in gray and purple, feature the brand name 'Teckwe' on the handle and include five interchangeable heads for various styling needs. Each brush measures approximately 11 inches in length. The absence of an immersion protection device increases the risk of electrocution if the brushes come into contact with water while plugged in.
recalls.Title: SHEIN Recalls Teckwe Multifunctional Hair Dryer Brushes Due to Electrocution Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to unplug and cease using the recalled hair dryer brushes immediately. For a full refund, contact SHEIN at 203-990-1005 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or email uscsteam@shein.com. Additional information is available at www.us.SHEIN.com under 'Product Recalls' or at https://us.shein.com/campaigns/productrecalls.

Images.Caption: Recalled Teckwe Hair Dryer Brush

Retailers.Name: Available online at SHEIN.com from July 2024 through October 2024, priced between $9 and $21.

Distributors.Name: SHEIN Distribution Corporation, of Los Angeles, California

Hazards.Name: Electrocution or shock hazard due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Full refund upon destruction of the product

recalls.metaDescription: SHEIN recalls Teckwe hair dryer brushes due to electrocution risks. Immediate action required for refunds.

recalls.Description: Focusee is recalling the Tideway High-Speed Hair Dryers PRO M01, which feature two speed settings and come with a nozzle. These hair dryers are predominantly white with a gold accent at the bottom of the handle, and 'Tideway' is displayed on the front. An LED ring indicates the temperature settings: red for hot air, orange for warm air, blue for cold air, and green for alternating hot and cold cycles.
recalls.Title: Focusee Issues Recall for Tideway High-Speed Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to unplug and cease using the affected hair dryers immediately. For a free replacement, contact Tideway Shop at 209-267-4999 from 8 a.m. to 7 p.m. CT on weekdays and 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT on weekends, or reach out via email at info@tideway.shop or tidewayshopify@gmail.com. Additional details can be found at https://tideway.shop/recall.

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution or shock due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Free replacement and instructions for safe disposal

recalls.metaDescription: Focusee recalls Tideway High-Speed Hair Dryers due to electrocution risks. Learn how to get a free replacement and safe disposal instructions.

recalls.Description: StyleCraft is recalling its Instinct Cordless Clippers, model SC607M, due to potential fire and burn hazards linked to the lithium-ion battery. The affected clippers are available in blue, red, and black, with the model and lot numbers printed on the back. The recall includes specific lot numbers: 35-22, 40-22, 15-23, 20-23, 25-23, 30-23, 35-23, and 40-23. The front cover features the letters 'SC' and the name 'INSTINCT'.
recalls.Title: StyleCraft Recalls Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can contact StyleCraft at 888-864-6409 from 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, via email at CSteam@stylecraftus.com, or visit www.stylecraftus.com/recall for more information.

Products.Name: Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 50,000 (In addition, about 1,320 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled StyleCraft Instinct Professional Vector Motor Cordless Hair Clippers (blue)
Recalled StyleCraft Instinct Professional Vector Motor Cordless Hair Clippers (blue)
Model and Lot number location on the recalled clippers

Injuries.Name: StyleCraft has received six reports of the batteries overheating or causing a fire, including one minor burn.

Retailers.Name: Available at professional beauty supply stores nationwide and online at www.stylecraftus.com and www.amazon.com from January 2023 through May 2024 for approximately $250.

Importers.Name: StyleCraft LLC, of Boca Raton, Florida

Hazards.Name: Overheating lithium-ion battery posing fire and burn risks

Remedies.Name: Stop using the clippers and follow StyleCraft's instructions for battery removal and free replacement. Batteries can be replaced at authorized service centers or by mailing the unit back to StyleCraft. Dispose of the battery per local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: StyleCraft recalls Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers due to fire and burn hazards. Contact for battery replacement details.

recalls.Description: Southern Telecom is recalling the Lomi Roll-On Waxing Kit, model LOMB2003PK, which includes a handheld wax warmer, wax cartridge, wax strips, power cord, and user manual. The product features the Lomi logo prominently on both the warmer and its packaging. Consumers should be aware that the power cord of the warmer may overheat, leading to potential fire, burn, and electrical shock hazards.
recalls.Title: Southern Telecom Issues Recall for Lomi Roll-On Waxing Kits Due to Fire and Shock Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Southern Telecom at 888-959-0944 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email support@customersupport123.com, or visit https://southerntelecom.com/recall-2024-06-13/ or www.southerntelecom.com and select “Recall: LOMB2003PK Roll-On Waxing Kit” for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Lomi Roll-On Waxing Kit
The Lomi logo and model number are on the bottom of the wax warmer

Injuries.Name: The firm has received two reports of the warmer's power cord overheating and/or short-circuiting, including two consumers who suffered burns, and one incident of property damage.

Retailers.Name: Available at Ross, DD's, Bealls, and Burlington stores across the country from April 2023 to October 2023 for approximately $13.

Importers.Name: Southern Telecom Inc., of New York

Hazards.Name: Fire, burn, and electrical shock hazards due to overheating power cord.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the kits immediately and contact Southern Telecom for a full refund. They will need to mark the wax warmer as 'Recalled,' unplug it, cut the power cord, and send a photo to Southern Telecom.

recalls.metaDescription: Southern Telecom recalls Lomi Roll-On Waxing Kits due to fire and shock hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.
